commentary_text: The model favors Australia at 44%, while sportsbooks and Polymarket both favor Paraguay at 44% and 43% respectively. On the Paraguay win outcome alone, the gap between model and sportsbooks reaches 18 percentage points. This divergence could reflect differences in how recent form, lineup changes, or injury developments are weighted by real-money markets versus the statistical model's Elo framework. The dashboard surfaces these competing signals without adjudicating which assessment is more reliable; both sources agree the match is competitive, but they disagree substantially on which team holds the edge.
